name: Massachusetts Food Truck Event Index (2025-2027)
subject: A curated index of 34 Massachusetts food-truck / food-truck-adjacent festivals spanning 2025 historical, 2026 current-season, and 2027 proposed. Captures event, city, county, venue, address, organizer, date, confidence status, contact path, and whether a truck lineup has been posted. The bulk are FTFA-organized (Food Truck Festivals of America) — 9 of the 34 events — with a secondary cluster of Foodees LLC, Wachusett Mountain, and independent community organizers. Comeketo's catering identity is wedding-vertical first, so this index is a strategic opportunity document: it enumerates where a Comeketo food-truck deployment COULD show up if the company chose to enter that channel, not an active vendor-booking calendar.

confidence_distribution.scheduled_with_posted_lineup: 12 events have 'Yes, posted lineup' or 'Strong posted lineup' noted

events: New Bedford Food Truck & Craft Beverage Festival
Worcester Food Truck & Craft Beverage Festival
Cape Cod Food Truck & Craft Beverage Festival
Framingham Food Truck & Craft Beverage Festival at Eastleigh Farm
Salem Food Truck & Craft Beverage Festival
Lakeville Food Truck & Craft Beverage Festival
Lynn Food Truck & Craft Beverage Festival
Buzzards Bay Food Truck & Craft Beverage Festival
Canton Food Truck & Craft Beverage Festival
Harvard Fall Fest (co-organized with Harvard Athletics)
food_truck_festivals_of_america_ftfa.observation: FTFA is the single biggest door. A vendor relationship with one FTFA event often opens others — the 'Craft Beverage Festival' template is replicated across cities. If Comeketo wanted to explore the food-truck channel at scale, FTFA is the one relationship to build.

foodees_llc.observation: Back-to-back 3-day festivals at premium outlet malls. Foodees LLC runs the whole show including vendor app — independent of FTFA.

wachusett_mountain.observation: Seasonal ski-resort-hosted fests. '20+ trucks' at each. Worcester County.

Quincy Food Truck Festival (Boston Host Lions)
City of Gardner Food Truck Festival
AAPI Art and Food Truck Festival (Wakefield Human Rights)
Greenway Food Truck and Fitness Festival (Rose Kennedy Greenway)
NMLC Food Truck Festival (National Marine Life Center)
Middleton Food Truck Festival (Middleton Congregational Church)
Ludlow Spring Food Truck Festival (Vanished Valley Brewing)
Webster Food Truck Festival + MEGA at Webster Lake

geographic_coverage.observation: Worcester County dominates — 10 of 34 events. Central-MA concentration is useful if Comeketo picks a tight geographic bet. Boston/Suffolk at only 2 (Harvard, Greenway) is thinner than expected for a metro-area play.

strategic_observations.is_this_an_active_channel_for_comeketo: Unclear from raw data. The sales decks emphasize weddings + churrasco. No food-truck operations are mentioned in the menu catalog (Bibi's prep list), staff roster, kitchen schedule, or sales scorecard. This index appears to be a scouting document — someone at Comeketo is tracking the food-truck market but there's no evidence of active bookings. Flag for Rodrigo.
strategic_observations.low_effort_reconnaissance: The highest-value next step is NOT 'apply to 34 events' — it's 'pick 2-3 FTFA events and get a vendor packet to understand requirements (permits, insurance, truck spec)'. Worcester and Salem have posted lineups — easy to see who the competitive set is.
strategic_observations.brazilian_cuisine_differentiator: Food truck fests tend to skew American comfort food (BBQ, burgers, tacos, lobster rolls). Brazilian churrasco on wheels would be distinctive — Coxinha, Pão de Queijo, picanha-by-the-skewer are natural food-truck products. There's a menu-fit story here if Rodrigo wants one.
data_quality_concerns: 9 of 34 events have 'Uncertain', 'Historical', 'Low-confidence', or 'TBA' status — nearly a third of the index is noisy. Before acting on any single event, recheck the official source.
Some organizer names are ambiguous ('Eastside Festivals or Webster Parks & Recreation mixed sourcing' for Webster).
'Harvard Fall Fest' is located in Boston but organized with Harvard Athletics — likely at an Allston athletic venue, not the central campus. Verify.

rodbot_voice_implications.vertical_distinction: Food truck festival outreach has a fundamentally different voice from wedding-venue outreach. Weddings = 'Precision, Infrastructure, Two Paths, Trust.' Food trucks = 'On-site, high-volume, quick service, event fee structure.' If Rodbot is ever asked to draft food-truck vendor-app copy, it must drop the wedding pillars and speak in event-producer language.
rodbot_voice_implications.keep_the_brazilian_hook: Across either vertical, 'Authentic Brazilian churrasco' is the single-most-differentiating product fact. Rodbot should not drop it. But the framing changes — wedding couples want the experience; festival goers want the food itself.

feeds_into: A future vertical-expansion decision document — is Comeketo entering the food-truck channel or sticking to weddings?
If yes: a vendor-application pipeline tracker (event × application status × response × show-up-rate × revenue).
If no: this file becomes a low-priority scouting reference, not a bedrock asset.
gap_to_close: Confirm with Rodrigo whether food trucks are in-scope. If no, demote this file or move to _vaults/.
Verify 9 uncertain/historical entries before they're used as prospecting targets.
Need a Comeketo food-truck operational profile — is there a truck? Is there a menu? Are there the required permits?

notes: The CSV has no row IDs or prioritization — it's a flat inventory. A follow-up should add tier columns (A/B/C fit, estimated fee, expected foot traffic, decision date).
'Brews & Bites Food Truck and Craft Beer Festival at Westgate Mall' is listed with Brockton in Bristol County — Brockton is actually in Plymouth County. Source data is inconsistent. Flag.

The Foodees Fest events (Wrentham July 10-12, Auburn July 17-19) are back-to-back mall weekends. Interesting vendor logistics — one vendor could hit both with a single truck if they wanted two weekends of high-traffic suburban retail exposure.
Interestingly, the 'venue_partners.json' in the bedrock tracks WEDDING venues — with 0 overlap to this food-truck event list. They are truly two different universes.

sources.diff: Indexed Massachusetts food-truck event index — 34 events across 10 counties spanning 2025-historical through 2027-proposed. FTFA (Food Truck Festivals of America) = 9 events, Foodees LLC = 2, Wachusett = 2, community-civic = 12. 17 confirmed-scheduled in 2026. Flagged strategic ambiguity: whether Comeketo is actually entering the food-truck channel or merely scouting. 9 of 34 events have uncertain/historical status — data quality caveats noted.
